title: Semicraft
description: Custom Modpack with stuff i like. Some Technical Mods some Exploration. Don't expect any Support. Just created for a private Server.
body:
A mid sized Modpack for players who look for a optimized fabric Modded Minecraft experience with lots of performance enhancements and Quality of Life Improvements. 
- Sodium 
- Memory Leak Fixes
- Indium and much more

This pack also contains lots of content expansion Mods for exploration and crafting. For example:
- Ad Astra with Star Wars Planet extension
- CC Tweaked
- Applied Energistics 2
- Create with lots of addons
- and much more

You can explore the World with its dungeons and vast landscape and build either your dream Factory or just use the decorative Blocks like Tables and Chairs or other furniture if you look for a more vanilla styled experience.

The Modpack comes with preinstalled shaderpacks and resourcepack addons in vanilla style. You could still install one yourself if you want.

All thanks go to the creator of the Mods.
